<!-- BEGIN curriculum:auto handbook-intro -->
<!-- generated by scripts/gen_docs.py — do not hand-edit; run the generator -->
XRPL Lab includes 21 modules across ten tracks. Each module teaches one skill and produces a verifiable artifact. Prerequisites are explicit and enforced.
<!-- END curriculum:auto handbook-intro -->

## Tracks

<!-- BEGIN curriculum:auto handbook-tracks-table -->
<!-- generated by scripts/gen_docs.py — do not hand-edit; run the generator -->
| Track | Focus | Modules | Mode |
|-------|-------|---------|------|
| **foundations** | wallet, payments, trust lines, error handling | 4 | testnet |
| **nfts** | NFT game assets: minting, marketplace settlement, dynamic NFTs (XLS-20) | 3 | testnet |
| **tokens** | Multi-Purpose Token (MPT) game-currency issuance & clawback (XLS-33) | 2 | testnet |
| **payments** | escrow & time-locked value | 2 | testnet |
| **identity** | Decentralized Identifiers (DID, XLS-40) | 1 | testnet |
| **dex** | offers, order books, market making, inventory management | 3 | testnet |
| **reserves** | account reserves, owner count, cleanup | 2 | testnet |
| **audit** | batch verification, audit reports | 1 | testnet |
| **amm** | automated market maker liquidity, DEX vs AMM comparison | 2 | dry-run |
| **capstone** | compose skills across tracks into one game-economy build | 1 | testnet |
<!-- END curriculum:auto handbook-tracks-table -->

The numbering below matches `xrpl-lab list` exactly: modules are ordered by track (in the canonical track order above), then by progression within each track. The **Produces** column lists the artifact kinds each module emits.

<!-- BEGIN curriculum:auto handbook-per-track -->
<!-- generated by scripts/gen_docs.py — do not hand-edit; run the generator -->

<!-- END curriculum:auto handbook-per-track -->

## Running a module

```bash
xrpl-lab run <module_id>
```

The CLI will warn you if prerequisites aren't met. Use `xrpl-lab list` to see your progress, track, mode, and the next recommended module.
